subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! This is the time of steadfastness, this is the day of unwavering constancy. From one direction waft the holy fragrances, and from another blow the noxious winds of doubt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبّای الهی دور دور ثبوت است یوم یوم رسوخست از جهتی نفحات قدس در مرور است و از جهتی سموم شبهات
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action
